name: io.github.getgapup/gapup-business-expertise
description: Gapup Business Expertise — 92 agent-payable C-suite expertises (CFO, CMO, CRO, CSO, CHRO, COO, Risk, Sustainability, Fundraising) delivering structured, audited deliverables: competitive intelligence, trend watching, deal scoring, risk scans, KYC, board packs, pricing strategy, fundraising dossiers and more. Agent-payable via HTTP 402 (USDC + EURC). Free tier 100 calls/mo.

env.name: GAPUP_API_KEY
env.description: API key for Gapup expertise endpoints. Free tier (100 calls/mo, no credit card) at https://hub.gapup.io/agents-api/onboard
